title: Capital Structure: A firm should prefer debt financing over equity financing because...
summary: Evaluate whether debt financing always increases firm value or may cause distress.
prompt: A firm should prefer debt financing over equity financing because it is always cheaper.

options.text: Debt can be cheaper due to tax benefits (interest is tax-deductible), but it

solution: Debt can be cheaper due to tax benefits (interest is tax-deductible), but it also increases financial risk. The optimal capital structure balances debt and equity to minimize the overall cost of capital while managing risk.
